title: VDL Citea - VOR Regionalbus
description: The VDL Citea with the VOR design is inspired from regional buses in Austria.
body:
The VOR livery of the VDL citea is completely fictional, but the livery is used for other Buses in Austria (Vienna, Lower Austria and Burgenland). The interior of the Bus is still not completely changed, although this will be changed in future versions.

Credits to: SzandorThe13th, CinderaceOTS

**MTR 3 only.**
